scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Dartmouth requires standardized testing. Students attending high school in the United States must submit SAT or ACT results; students outside the U.S. may satisfy the requirement through SAT/ACT or approved national or diploma exam pathways.

claims.claim: Dartmouth requires standardized testing. Students attending high school in the United States must submit SAT or ACT results; students outside the U.S. may satisfy the requirement through SAT/ACT or approved national or diploma exam pathways.
